name: seo-for-ai
description: Audit and optimize websites for AI agent visibility (AEO/GEO) alongside classic SEO. Use when asked to audit a page/site for AI agents, check AI-readiness, review JSON-LD / Schema.org markup, fix bot policy, set up llms.txt, debug why ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity don't cite the site, check Cloudflare bot rules, or implement AI-friendly content patterns (FAQ, comparison tables, steps, proof links). Triggers: SEO, AEO, GEO, AI visibility, AI-видимость, оптимизация под поисковых агентов, llms.txt, structured data, schema.org, robots.txt for AI bots, Bing Webmaster Tools, IndexNow.
